hook: The quiet before the panic hits harder.
slide2: I keep checking my watch even though I have nowhere to go. The silence in the room is louder than my thoughts.
slide3: What if today’s the day I actually crack? Not like crying into a pillow—like screaming into an empty house.
slide4: I hate how clean this apartment looks when my head doesn’t match. Like a perfectly staged Instagram versus the 3am spiral.
closer: Who else just needs this day to be over?
caption: Sunday mornings shouldn’t feel like a countdown. Do you also hate how peaceful everything looks when you’re not?
